scorer_changelog.1.2.0: C-Q6: speech-ratio scoring is enabled against the public-domain spoken fixture, with the existing ±0.1 tolerance. Pass/fail semantics now include speech ratio.
scorer_changelog.1.1.0: F-09/F-12: leftover cuts are never positionally zipped into fabricated out-of-tolerance matches — a pair requires a delta within out_of_tolerance_pairing_window_seconds, everything else is reported missing/extra; matcher rewritten iteratively for real-video event counts. Pass/fail semantics unchanged; per-event match lists differ from 1.0.0.

cuts.matching: maximum-cardinality one-to-one chronological; leftovers pair as out-of-tolerance matches only within the pairing window, otherwise they are reported as missing/extra, never paired

captions.normalization: Unicode NFKC, casefold, punctuation removal, whitespace collapse

speech_ratio.reason: Unavailable only when a truth fixture omits speech_ratio.
